text:
There once was a young boy named Tom who loved to build models in his spare time. He used to spend hours in his uncle’s old workshop, piecing together trains, airplanes, and anything else his creative mind could conjure.

Tom created worlds with his models. He imagined a land called "Modelonia," inhabited by tiny people who lived harmoniously. Each intricate aircraft had a story, each train was a testament to an adventure, and every model he completed was a friend.

One crisp autumn morning, after making yet another masterpiece, Tom realized that his grandmother was coming to visit. She was fond of his work, sometimes taking models to show to friends and family. She always praised his talent, urging him to create more.

Walking home from the workshop, he carried a small model of a dragon. It was quite simple, but he decorated it with tiny feathers and a sparkling mouth, dreaming of the adventure it would bring to Modelonia.

His grandmother greeted him at the door with her warm
